case_title: BRICK & TIMBER, INC. VS. VALENTIN ZAMORA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMORA, VALENTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 755 O'FARRELL STREET, #42 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 74186680)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 74186680) AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, VALENTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, VALENTIN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 74052880), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. SERVED AUG-09-2024, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $56.50/DAY (TRANSACTION ID # 74186680) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF TONG, DYLAN ON OCT-18-2024 THROUGH NOV-04-2024 (TRANSACTION ID # 74629969) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY - PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 74629969) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, VALENTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 74186680) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRICK & TIMBER, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, VALENTIN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, VALENTIN
